name: Compounding Workflow
description: Decision logic for when query answer should be saved as new wiki page. Triggers on novel synthesis, contradiction resolution, or entity/concept supplementation.

trigger_criteria.description: Synthesis from ≥2 wiki pages producing new logical conclusion (A+B→C), not mere aggregation
Contradiction resolved between wiki sources requiring documentation in separate page
Answer adds new facts to existing entity/concept that warrant standalone page

guardrails.enforcement: All compounding proposals → user_confirm → TRANSITION to process-ingest.json. Direct edit() without ingest flow is prohibited.
All wiki create/update operations MUST go through process-ingest.json steps. Web sources must pass step_2.7 gateway.

topic_expansion_rule.action_if_met: AUTO_INGEST_TOPIC_EXPANSION — TRANSITION_TO process-ingest.json via web_ingest_flow, create_new_expansion_of_existing (no user_confirm required)
topic_expansion_rule.description: New page relates to existing topic in wiki → auto-ingest. Example: Symfony exists in wiki → new page 'Migrations in Symfony' → topic expansion

new_independent_topic_rule.description: Independent topic not found in wiki → propose to user. Confirm required ONLY FOR FIRST PAGE OF THIS TOPIC.
new_independent_topic_rule.post_first_approval_note: Once topic approved in wiki → subsequent pages for same topic become topic_expansion (auto_ingest)

structure.step_1: check if web_search_used (determine topic_expansion vs new_independent_topic)

structure.step_2: IF topic_expansion → execute process-ingest.json via web_ingest_flow (create_new_expansion_of_existing, auto)
